_description: Canonical timestamp format for all VSO platform components (g8ee, g8eo, VSOD).
_notes: Always UTC — no offset notation (+00:00 or -07:00), always the literal Z suffix.
Fractional seconds are always included when non-zero; the sub-second part is omitted only when the value is exactly on a whole second.
Consumers MUST accept any valid RFC3339Nano string regardless of sub-second precision (nanoseconds, microseconds, milliseconds, or none).
Producers MUST emit the highest precision available natively (nanoseconds in Go, microseconds in Python, milliseconds in JavaScript).
Sorting lexicographically on this format yields correct chronological order.

consumers.g8ee: app/utils/timestamp.py — now_iso() emits RFC3339Nano (microsecond precision, always present when non-zero)
consumers.VSOD: utils/timestamp.js — nowISOString() emits RFC3339Nano (millisecond precision via Date)
